Product page template / library release

Library Pinot
Vertical

A collector-focused PDP mockup for a three-vintage vertical. The page leans into cellar time, bottle comparison, and one premium bundle decision.

2019 Rose petal, cedar, red cherry
2020 Forest floor, blood orange, tea
2021 Pomegranate, spice, cool earth

Bundle offer mockup

$285

Three vintages, one collector set, positioned as cellar depth rather than inventory math.

Reserve vertical
  • Library allocation, 3 bottles
  • Single shipping window
  • Collector note card in the box

Comparison module

Vintage by vintage

The middle of the page helps the buyer understand why each year matters so the bundle feels curated, not just stacked.

Story layer

Cellar rationale

Collector language is kept precise and clean: age curve, drinking window, and why a vertical is worth opening over time.

Checkout logic

Premium without clutter

The buy box stays simple while the surrounding modules do the emotional work required for a higher-consideration purchase.
